scope: Canonical 8xMI350 TorchTitan/Primus AdamW dry-run for the current canary path.

run.result: Primus direct dry-run built the 8-rank torchrun command and did not execute training.

shape.model_proxy: DeepSeek-V3 16B used as the DeepSeek-V4-style TorchTitan integration proxy

remote_artifacts.raw_outputs_policy: Remote logs stay under /local/data; this repo artifact records the compact result and pointers.

command.built_torchrun: torchrun --nproc_per_node 8 --nnodes 1 --node_rank 0 --master_addr localhost --master_port 29527 --local-ranks-filter 0,7 --no-python /workspace/Primus/runner/helpers/numa_bind.sh primus/cli/main.py train pretrain --config /local/data/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527/config/torchtitan_deepseek_v3_16b_bf16_8xmi350_canary.yaml --backend_path /workspace/Primus/third_party/torchtitan --job.dump_folder /local/data/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527/output/torchtitan_dsv4style_dsv3_16b_bf16_8xmi350_adamw_dryrun_20260531T000000Z --training.steps 2 --training.local_batch_size 1 --training.global_batch_size 16 --training.seq_len 4096 --training.debug_moe_force_load_balance false --parallelism.tensor_parallel_degree 1 --parallelism.pipeline_parallel_degree 1 --parallelism.context_parallel_degree 1 --parallelism.expert_parallel_degree 8 --parallelism.data_parallel_shard_degree -1 --activation_checkpoint.mode full --checkpoint.enable true --checkpoint.interval 1 --checkpoint.last_save_model_only false --checkpoint.load_step -1 --compile.enable false --model.hf_assets_path /workspace/Primus/third_party/torchtitan/tests/assets/tokenizer --backend_path /workspace/Primus/third_party/torchtitan

observations: The canonical launcher defaults to CANARY_OPTIMIZER_MODE=adamw and stages the AdamW target config.
No mixed-Muon optimizer overlay was copied or installed for this run.
Primus hooks resolved the image-local TorchTitan tokenizer fixture and appended the resolved backend path.
Dry-run reported 8 visible GPUs and warned that AMD GPU devices were in a low-power state, which is expected when idle.
next: Use the same launcher for the next real AdamW save/resume or GBS128 perf smoke when the node is intentionally allocated.
Keep mixed Muon/AdamW artifacts as future-work references rather than a current milestone gate.
